growth_records.medium: N-free medium (nitrogen-free selective medium for diazotroph isolation)

sec.compound: ethylene (C2H4, acetylene-reduction proxy for N2 fixation / nitrogenase activity)

growth_records.cite: Zhang, Liyu et al. A highly conserved core bacterial microbiota with nitrogen-fixation capacity inhabits the xylem sap in maize plants. Nature Communications (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41467-022-31113-w. [PMC9187771]
growth_records.snippet: one strain mapping to the most abundant core OTU (29.2%) was identified as K. variicola and contained the entire nif gene cluster with nitrogenase activity of up to 1180 nmol C2H4 (mg protein hr)-1
growth_records.notes: This is the ONLY experimental prokaryote metabolic rate found across the 4 papers in this batch. It is a nitrogenase (acetylene-reduction) enzyme activity, NOT a growth-coupled substrate-uptake or product-secretion exchange flux, and NOT expressed per gDW; captured for completeness and clearly flagged. Value 1180 nmol C2H4/mg protein/h is the maximum reported for K. variicola MNAZ1050 (Discussion; Fig 4d). No growth rate (mu), doubling time, temperature, pH, or medium composition is stated for this isolate. A second N-fixing core strain, Citrobacter sp. MNAZ1397, also showed high nitrogenase activity (Fig 4d) but no numeric value is given in text. Combinations (KC + helper strains) raised total nitrogenase activity above diazotrophs alone (Fig 4e) but only relative ratios, not absolute rates, are reported. In-planta SynCom (K. variicola MNAZ1050 + Citrobacter MNAZ1397 + Acinetobacter ACZLY512 + Rosenbergiella epipactidis YCCK550) contributed via BNF 4.01% (root), 11.81% (stem), 0.46% (leaf) of accumulated N by 15N isotopic dilution (Table 1: N2-fixed 2.55, 9.72, 0.63 mg respectively) — a whole-plant contribution, not a per-cell rate. No qS/Yxs derivable. PMC9159947 (Mtb CRISPRi drug-potency screen) and PMC9184479 (L. rhamnosus-C. albicans-IEC, in silico FBA/FVA only, growth by CFU with no reported rates) yielded NO experimental prokaryote uptake/secretion/growth rates.

phenotypes.base_medium: Acid/gas-production test: peptone/complex base + substrate + pH indicator — positive = fermentative acid production, NOT growth on the substrate as a sole carbon source (interpret with care for model validation)
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 4966 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/4966
